title: Goonables
description: Enhances gameplay with performance improvements, expanded exploration, automation, and a smoother, richer experience.
body:
# 🌍 Goonables

## 🎮 Start Your Adventure
#### A massive Fabric 1.20.1 survival modpack built for adventure, exploration, tech, bosses, building, and long-term progression.

#### Minecraft, but with more to discover, more to fight, more to build, and more reasons to keep playing.

#### Create a world, gather your first resources, build a base, and start exploring. You will find new structures, new enemies, new gear, new places, and new goals as you play. Whether you want to build a cozy home, fight bosses, automate everything, travel to space, or explore every corner of the world, this pack gives you a reason to keep going.

#### This pack expands the game in almost every direction while keeping the core survival experience easy to understand. Start simple, explore the world, build your base, fight stronger enemies, unlock better gear, visit new dimensions, and work your way into advanced tech.

---

## ✨ What is this pack?

This is a large survival modpack made for players who want a bigger Minecraft experience.

You can:

* 🧭 Explore new structures, villages, dungeons, and biomes
* ⚔️ Fight new mobs, bosses, and stronger enemies
* 🚀 Travel to space with **Ad Astra**
* ☁️ Visit new dimensions like **The Aether**
* 🔧 Build machines, storage systems, and tech setups
* 🏡 Decorate your base with new furniture and building blocks
* 🐾 Find pets, animals, and extra world life
* 🎵 Enjoy better sounds, particles, animations, and atmosphere
* 🧰 Use quality-of-life mods that make survival smoother

The goal is simple: make Minecraft feel bigger without making it confusing.

---

## 👥 Multiplayer Friendly

This pack works well for groups because different players can focus on different goals.

One player can build. Another can explore. Someone else can make machines. Another can hunt bosses or travel to space.

### Good for:

* 🏗️ Builders
* ⚔️ Fighters
* 🧭 Explorers
* 🔧 Tech players
* 🚀 Space players
* 🐾 Collectors
* 👥 Friend groups and servers

There is enough content for everyone to have their own path.

---

## 📌 Quick Features

* Fabric 1.20.1
* 675 mods
* Adventure-focused survival
* Space travel
* New dimensions
* Better villages and structures
* Bosses and stronger enemies
* Tech and storage systems
* Furniture and decoration
* Pets and extra animals
* Visual and sound improvements
* Quality-of-life upgrades
* Great for singleplayer or multiplayer
